paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12 as of July 20, 2026, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which will take place on August 13, 2026, as reported by FinanzNachrichten.de on July 20, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a recent SCHEDULE 13G filing on July 20, 2026, and 8-K filings on July 15, July 13, and July 9, 2026, which include information about the issuance of convertible senior notes and the resignation of a director. There has been one Form 4 filing.
